title: State: broadcast_to_group() method on AppState
description:
What: Add broadcast_to_group() to AppState that fans out a message to a specified set of member pub_ids.

Algorithm:
1. Add method: pub async fn broadcast_to_group(&self, members: &[String], exclude: Option<&str>, msg: String)
2. Collect live channels for members (same pattern as existing broadcast() but filtered to members slice)
3. For each member in members (minus exclude):
   a. deliver_live(member, msg.clone()).await → bool
   b. If false: state.inner.store.enqueue(member, &msg).await (log warn on error)
4. Do NOT hold DashMap lock across any await point (collect channels first, then drive sends)

Defensive rules:
- Never hold RwLock or DashMap guard across .await
- Individual send failure is silently absorbed (broken channel = disconnected client)
- enqueue errors are warn! only, not propagated

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay passes; method compiles with -D warnings
